title: feat: hide expired API keys from dashboard
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the dashboard
gist.blurb: Expired API keys now politely hide themselves from your dashboard. Because nobody needs to be reminded of a temporary key from three months ago.
gist.summary: The dashboard now automatically filters out expired API keys from the list view.
gist.impact: Users will see a cleaner interface with only active API keys, reducing visual clutter.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and Nomnom cleaning up old keys. Nomnom eating the expired keys while Polly organizes the shiny new ones on a retro monitor.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, organizing shiny glowing keys on a retro computer monitor. Nearby, the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats dusty, greyed-out expired keys. Speech bubble: 'NOMNOM' in pixel font. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
